title: monsters
author: june
body:
Why are humans inherentally horrible.
We're made to steal, kill, lie, deceit, manipulate others for our own benefit.
We put ourselves before others, expecting them to put ourselfs before them
We are monsters
Monsters who mask themselves as sheeps
Monsters who prance around among the flock of sheep's awaiting for the perfect time to snag the other.
Monsters who feel pleasured from being a inconvience to a person.

What really sucks is I am that monster, Thinking about it adds on to my guilt more and more. 
Im lost, Can I be better than other people or am I just a fucking sheep waiting to be bitten by a fucktard monster.
